name: ifs-lsp-dev
description: IFS Marble/PLSQL Language Server plugin for Claude Code

plugins.name: ifs-lsp
plugins.description: IFS Marble/PLSQL Language Server for Claude Code. Provides code intelligence, go-to-definition, find references, diagnostics, and code generation for IFS application files (.plsql, .plsvc, .fragment, .ins, .client, .projection, .entity, .cre, .cdb, .upg).
